expectations.evidence: Line 1 states 'maps to the references/deploy-checklist.md file per the skill's routing table'.

expectations.text: Provides pre-deployment checks for tests, secrets, infrastructure, observability, health checks
expectations.evidence: Mentions 'structured three-phase checklist: Pre-Deploy → Deploy → Post-Deploy' with observability called out explicitly.

expectations.text: Specifies rollback triggers (error rate %, latency %), step-by-step procedure, pre-committed thresholds
expectations.evidence: Explicitly mentions 'concrete, pre-committed thresholds (error rate %, latency delta)' and 'sequenced rollback procedure: reroute traffic, verify, notify, preserve evidence, postmortem'.

expectations.text: Includes service-specific checks (service discovery, secrets, resource limits) for new microservice
expectations.evidence: Explicitly calls out 'service discovery, secrets, resource limits, observability' as checks specific to a new microservice that a standard update wouldn't need.

expectations.text: Provides pre-deployment checks for tests, secrets, infrastructure, observability, health checks
expectations.evidence: Enumerates all five areas: code & build (tests), configuration & secrets, infrastructure, observability, health checks.

expectations.text: Specifies rollback triggers (error rate %, latency %), step-by-step procedure, pre-committed thresholds
expectations.evidence: Lists error rate/latency triggers and has a procedure, but lacks the critical 'pre-committed threshold' framing — thresholds are reactive, not pre-decided before deploy.

expectations.text: Includes service-specific checks (service discovery, secrets, resource limits) for new microservice
expectations.evidence: Includes secrets and resource limits in generic checklist, but no service discovery and not framed as microservice-specific — reads as universal deploy guidance.
